task.objective: Post-bootstrap milestone 6 (first slice) per ADR-0006: TimelineSample (time/growth/season/wind) through evaluation with frame-exact determinism; hierarchical wind sway with deterministic per-node oscillators, gust envelope and preserved trunk base; growth with depth-derived parent-relative timing gating and scaling structure; per-leaf deterministic season drop plus material season_color (schema 1.2.0) blended in MTL export; CLI timeline flags; animated diagnostic showcases (wind GIF, growth GIF, seasons strip).

outputs: src/evaluation: TimelineSample, growth_factor with depth defaults, season leaf drop, apply_wind hierarchical transform pass, NodeKind/depth/base metadata
src/export: seasonal Kd blend in MTL
tests: wind determinism/base pivot/topology stability, growth gating and scaling, season drop monotonic determinism

validation.result: 100% tests passed (12 suites) on both presets
wind loop 26 frames (topology hash invariant across time); growth 210 -> 43,164 tris across lifecycle; season drop 104,417 -> 37,331 tris from summer to winter, deterministic per sample

risks: Wind is rigid per-node sway (no intra-branch flex); runtime game-wind vertex channels arrive with the runtime compiler
Season color blends per material (global), not per node; per-node mottled color needs export-side material instancing
Dropped leaves are omitted rather than deposited as ground debris (13 'Dropped foliage' later)
Growth emergence angle/orientation transition controls not yet implemented
